p{margin:0
0 32px 0}.content

Rare: A Calendar Watch Worth Collecting.
body:
Hi ,

“Not mass-produced. Not rushed. The Kingston Automatic Calendar is here for those who love a good timepiece.”

There are many automatic watches, but very few with the full character of Kingston. This is not just another calendar complication—it’s a balance of mechanical engineering, readability, and timeless design. For serious watch lovers, Kingston is a piece that speaks across generations.

  • Automatic mechanical caliber

subject: Top 10 im TV: Die besten Filme am Wochenende
body:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office">

<head>
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8"> <!-- needed for ELAINE 5 import to work -->
  <meta charset="utf-8"> <!-- utf-8 works for most cases -->
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width"> <!-- Forcing initial-scale shouldn't be necessary -->
  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge"> <!-- Use the latest (edge) version of IE rendering engine -->
  <meta name="x-apple-disable-message-reformatting"> <!-- Disable auto-scale in iOS 10 Mail entirely -->
  <title>TV Spielfilm</title> <!-- The title tag shows in email notifications, like Android 4.4. -->

  <!-- Web Font / @font-face : BEGIN -->
  <!-- NOTE: If web fonts are not required, lines 10 - 27 can be safely removed. -->

  <!-- Desktop Outlook chokes on web font references and defaults to Times New Roman, so we force a safe fallback font.
